parameters-en.Gain: Controls the amount of preamp gain applied to the signal.
parameters-en.Polarity: Inverts the polarity of the signal.
parameters-en.Low Cut: Applies a low cut (high pass) filter, letting you remove all audio below a certain frequency. May be useful in removing undesirable low end rumble or mic plosives.
parameters-en.High Cut: Applies a high cut (low pass) filter, letting you remove all audio above a certain frequency. May be useful in removing high end harshness.
parameters-en.Level: Controls the overall level of the Preamp block.
parameters-en.Sensitivity: Determines whether the preamp accommodates a mic-level or line-level signal.
